title: Glowy's Pack
description: ⚙️ Tech, magic, bosses, and RPG progression — build smart, fight hard, and explore endlessly.
body:
Step into a world where engineering, magic, and adventure collide.
This modpack blends deep automation, immersive RPG progression, and dangerous exploration into one seamless experience.

Build massive factories and clever contraptions with Create, Mekanism, Oritech, and Refined Storage, or dive into automation and programming using ComputerCraft. Choose your path with RPG-style classes, shaping your playstyle through combat, magic, or technology.

The world is filled with powerful enemies and unforgettable encounters, featuring mods like Bosses of Mass Destruction, Mowzie’s Mobs, and Qliphoth Awakening, pushing your skills and gear to the limit. Explore new realms such as The Aether, uncover hidden secrets, and travel with ease using Waystones.

Balance the chaos with cozy and rewarding gameplay through Farmer’s Delight, adding depth to farming, cooking, and survival. Whether you’re a builder, explorer, fighter, or engineer, this modpack offers something for every kind of player — and much more beyond what meets the eye.

Join our Discord to get the IP here:
[Discord Link](https://discord.gg/pWEPd4FSj6)
